name: JLL Commercial Real Estate Data API
what_it_does: JLL (Jones Lang LaSalle) data and analytics APIs for commercial real estate intelligence and facilities management platform. Enables AI agents to manage CRE market vacancy and availability statistics retrieval for market analysis, handle transaction and lease comparable data for investment and leasing analytics, access JLL Research market outlook and forecast data for strategic planning, retrieve facilities management performance data from JLL property management operations, manage corporate occupier portfolio analytics for workplace strategy, handle construction cost and development feasibility data, access technology platform (JLL Spark portfolio) analytics for proptech integration, retrieve energy and sustainability performance data for ESG reporting, manage investment management data for institutional investor clients, and integrate JLL market intelligence with corporate real estate, investment management, and facilities platforms.
use_cases: Accessing CRE market data from portfolio strategy agents
Retrieving facilities KPIs from property management agents
Analyzing leasing markets from corporate real estate agents
Monitoring sustainability metrics from ESG reporting agents
not_for: Residential real estate without commercial property institutional focus
Consumer real estate without institutional CRE services context
best_when: An institutional CRE investor, corporate occupier, or JLL facilities management client wants AI agents to automate CRE market analysis, portfolio benchmarking, facilities performance monitoring, and sustainability reporting.
avoid_when: LICENSING RISK: JLL research data and market statistics are proprietary; redistribution requires authorization. JLL and CBRE market data use different property classifications and market area definitions; cross-provider comparison requires methodology alignment.

auth.notes: JLL data API uses OAuth 2.0. Enterprise client relationship required. JLL Azara is their data intelligence platform with API access. JLL Spark venture arm invests in proptech. Limited public API documentation. No webhooks. Chicago, Illinois HQ. Public (JLL NYSE). $20B+ annual revenue.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — client relationship required
pricing.paid_tiers: Data licensing as part of advisory or facilities management engagement
pricing.notes: Chicago, Illinois. Founded 1783. Public (JLL NYSE). $20B+ annual revenue. Global CRE services firm in 80+ countries. JLL Technologies (JLLT) for proptech platform. JLL Spark for proptech ventures. JLL Azara for data intelligence. Competes with CBRE and Cushman & Wakefield for global CRE services.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; client-negotiated

known_agent_gotchas: LICENSING RISK: JLL market research redistribution requires licensing authorization; validate data rights before building data products
JLL Azara platform — JLL Azara is their data intelligence platform; API access through Azara rather than direct JLL research; understand the platform architecture
Relationship-gated access — JLL data API requires active client or property management relationship; standalone data API access requires separate negotiation
JLLT product ecosystem — JLL Technologies (JLLT) has multiple proptech products; understand which JLLT product has the data you need before integration
Facilities data access — JLL-managed property data requires JLL facilities management relationship; market data is separate from facilities operations data
Data vintage — CRE market statistics are quarterly; real-time market data unavailable for JLL research product
agent_readiness.security_notes: CRE market intelligence and facilities. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/APAC. Commercial property and facilities data.

security_score_components.security_notes: CRE market and facilities. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Property market and facilities data.
